title: Single Brain — Your AI Department, Deployed in 30 Days
rawContent: Single Brain — Your AI Department, Deployed in 30 Days Single Brain by Single Grain Work With Us 6 agents running in production right now with a responsive one that hides on mobile --> Same headcount: 3x pipeline, 2x deal size, half the cycle time. Secure AI revenue agents. We build and manage teams of AI agents that run your revenue operations 24/7. They source leads, write outbound, create content, recruit candidates, and get smarter every week. Work With Us See how it works → Trusted by teams at The Problem Your team spends 60% of their time on work AI agents can do better, faster, and around the clock. $500K+/year What hiring an internal AI team costs — if you can even find the talent. 6–12 months How long building it internally takes. Your competitors won't wait. Most 'AI tools' Are chatbots with a nice UI. They require your team to prompt them all day. You need an AI department that works today . We deploy one in 45 days . Results The numbers speak. 3× Pipeline Growth Median pipeline expansion across active deployments in the first 90 days. 45 Days to Live From kickoff to agents running in production with measurable output. 24/7 Always On Agents work nights, weekends, and holidays — no PTO, no burnout, no gaps. What We Deploy Your agent team, fully managed. Each agent has a name, a role, a budget, and a security clearance. They report to you through Slack, email, or a custom dashboard. Scout Lead Intelligence Scans funding rounds, hiring signals, tech stack changes. Scores 200+ prospects per week. Archer Outbound Sales 200 personalized emails per day across 14 sender domains. A/B tests every subject line and angle. Pulse Pipeline Manager Monitors every active deal. No prospect goes 48 hours without a touchpoint. Stalled deals and revival opportunities get automatic re-engagement. Oracle SEO & Content Intelligence Keyword opportunities, content decay detection, and competitive gap analysis. High-quality content production and strategic briefs at scale. Flash Content Production Daily articles, data visualizations, carousels, newsletter drafts. Expert-panel scored evals before publishing. Sentinel Operations & Reporting Daily executive dashboards, weekly ROI reports, cost monitoring. Flags anomalies and keeps every agent accountable to its KPIs. How It Works Live in 45 days, compounding forever. Week 1 Strategy & Design We learn your operations, map pain points, design your agent team. You approve the blueprint. Weeks 2–4 Deploy & Pilot 1–2 agents go live. Full audit trails. Human approval gates. Measurable results within the first week. Month 2+ Scale & Compound Add agents. Expand workflows. Experiment engine promotes winners automatically. Security Enterprise-grade by default. Deployed on NVIDIA's enterprise AI runtime. Kernel-level agent isolation. enterprise-grade architecture. Every action logged to tamper-evident audit trail. Your data stays in your environment. NVIDIA Use Cases Already running. Already compounding. 200+ leads/week Revenue Operations We deployed 3 revenue agents for an insurance holding company. 200+ qualified leads per week, 40+ booked meetings per month, zero stale pipeline. 80 candidates/day Recruiting at Scale 5 recruiting agents sourcing 80 candidates per day across 5 roles. All scored, deduplicated, with outreach drafted. 362K daily impressions Content Engine Daily X articles, weekly newsletters, Instagram carousels, LinkedIn posts. All data-backed, expert-panel scored. What Clients Say " We've been building with AI agents for 18 months. Single Brain is the first time we've seen an outside team match the output quality of our internal stack — and they did it in three weeks, not three quarters. The ROI was visible by week 2. YM Yaniv Masjedi Co-founder, Nextiva FAQ Common questions. How is this different from hiring an AI consultant? + Consultants give you a strategy deck. We deploy working agents that produce measurable output from week 1. And the agents get smarter every week — consultants don't. Is our data secure? + We deploy on NVIDIA NemoClaw with kernel-level isolation, enterprise-grade architecture, and full audit trails. Your data never leaves your environment. What if it doesn't work? + We start with a 45-day pilot. 1-2 agents, measurable outcomes, no long-term commitment. You'll know within a month. How much does it cost? + That depends on the scope and goals. Fill out a form and we can scope it. Your competitors are building AI departments right now. The companies that start compounding first will be unreachable in 12 months. Don't be the one playing catch-up. Work With Us No long-term commitment required — starts as a 45-day pilot.
